allow: Bash(python -c "from med_routing.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\('weak:', s.weak_model\); print\('strong:', s.strong_model\); print\('key set:', bool\(s.openai_api_key\) and len\(s.openai_api_key\)>10\)")
